title: Web Page Ranking Process in a Search Engine
description: A flowchart illustrating the sequential steps and key components a search engine uses to rank web pages for a given query.
relationships: Process starts with a User Query, which is used to retrieve a large set of Candidate Web Pages from the index. These candidates are then passed to a Relevance Scoring module that evaluates them against hundreds of ranking signals. The resulting scores are processed by the core Ranking Algorithm to order the pages. The final output is a Ranked Results Page presented to the user.
